RevisionEvent.Note: Only known prior ReleaseDate of the metadata
Added HelioData InformationURL, Updated to SPASE Version 2.7.1. JWL

ResourceHeader.Acknowledgement: Please acknowledge Pieter Kotze, Hermanus Magnetic Observatory, P.O. Box 32, Hermanus, South Africa 7200 for providing access to Hermanus data resources.

InformationURL.Name: Hermanus geomagnetic observatory English language web site
InformationURL.Description: Hermanus geomagnetic observatory English language web site hosted by the Intermagnet program (International Real-time Magnetic Observatory Group).

InformationURL.Name: Hermanus geomagnetic observatory French language web site
InformationURL.Description: Hermanus geomagnetic observatory French language web site hosted by the Intermagnet program (International Real-time Magnetic Observatory Group).

InformationURL.Name: HelioData
InformationURL.Description: The HelioData mission page provides an overview of the mission and more, such as all SPASE dataset records associated with it.
